The '''Sun-lizard''' or '''Tralusian sun-lizard''' was a reptile that inhabited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]] in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. They had the ability to regenerate both their limbs and their tail.<ref name="EGPM" /> They could be domesticated as pets and live in cages.<ref name="GH">''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]''</ref>
